segments.subtitle: agent-garrison · run → propose → diff → approve → applied · 2026-06-15

beats.caption: The review queue starts empty — the Improver proposes, a human approves or rejects
beats.expectedScreen: the Improver — Review Queue view, Queue tab, empty-state reading No proposals yet. Run the Improver to populate the queue.

beats.caption: Run the Improver now — it reads real memory and proposes promoting stable notes to the vault
beats.expectedScreen: a proposal card appears: claim '… learned note(s) in MEMORY.md are stable enough to promote to canonical vault conventions', a PENDING badge, rule memory-consolidation

beats.caption: Show the diff — exactly which notes it wants to promote, as an additive change
beats.expectedScreen: the proposal diff is expanded, showing added lines for the memory notes (e.g. '## claude-pty screen detection')

beats.caption: Approve — applied through the authoring contract, then reconcile('post-authoring') runs
beats.expectedScreen: the proposal card now shows an APPLIED status with evidence (bytes written); the pending count drops to 0

beats.caption: Per-rule autonomy: memory-consolidation now carries a 1/5 accept streak toward auto-apply
beats.expectedScreen: the Autonomy tab listing the memory-consolidation rule with an accept streak (1 of 5) — promotion is streak-gated, demotion is instant

segments.caption: Proof it really applied: queue status, the written vault file, and the reconcile record
segments.expectedScreen: terminal: queue status 'applied', the applied-conventions.md file now containing the improver-marked promoted notes, and a reconcile record with trigger=post-authoring

segments.text: Improver: real proposals, reviewed, applied & reconciled
segments.subtitle: never-clobber authoring · per-rule autonomy · streak-gated promotion
